headline: Walmart and 8 More Old Economy Stocks for an AI Melt Up
summary: The Nasdaq keeps hitting record highs. It’s time to take a look at something besides chips, AI, and software. Here are nine companies to consider.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Linde, Raises Price Target to $570
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Linde (NASDAQ:LIN) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $552 to $570.

headline: Linde Earns Dow Jones Best-in-Class and S&P Global Recognition for Sustainability Leadership
summary: WOKING, England, May 05, 2026--Linde (Nasdaq: LIN) today announced it has been included in the Dow Jones Best-in-Class Indices (previously known as Dow Jones Sustainability Indices) for the 23rd consecutive year.

raw.headline: Linde Earns Dow Jones Best-in-Class and S&P Global Recognition for Sustainability Leadership

headline: LINDE PLC : Bernstein gives a Buy rating
summary: In a research note published by James Hooper, Bernstein advises its customers to buy the stock. The target price continues to be set at USD 561.
